description: A C2PA signing certificate that the creator publishes as belonging to them. Allows verifiers to second-factor a C2PA signature against the creator's atproto identity: a signing certificate is considered attested by this DID iff its SHA-256 fingerprint matches one in an active record of this collection. One record per certificate; rotation is additive (publish a new record), retirement uses validUntil.

label.description: Human-readable label for this key (e.g. 'rAIdio.bot ES256 signing key', 'YubiKey 5C nano').

fingerprint.description: Cryptographic fingerprint of the certificate's DER encoding. Format: 'sha256:' followed by lowercase hex.

algorithm.description: Signature algorithm advertised by this certificate's public key.

validFrom.description: Earliest time this key should be considered authoritative for the creator. Verifiers reject records where now < validFrom. Defaults to createdAt if unset.

validUntil.description: Time after which this key should not be trusted. Verifiers reject records where now >= validUntil. Absent means open-ended validity.

supersededBy.description: AT-URI of a newer signingKey record that replaces this one. Informational — verifiers should rely on validUntil for trust decisions.
